title: Spent months building a B2B SaaS for SEO agencies, but I absolutely suck at sales. How do devs find growth partners?
summary: Hey guys, I’m a developer and I recently launched a technical audit tool that helps SEO agencies optimize client sites for LLM engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity). With the recent Ahrefs data showing that 72% of AI responses strip brand links, the technical pain point is definitely there. Agencies love the automated reports because it helps them upsell their clients, and the product itself is solid. But here is my bottleneck: I am a pure backend dev. I get zero dopamine from cold email campaign
